channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Rot from containers
item.description: Allows rot to be extracted from containers through a crafting grid.

item.title: Freshness Overlay
item.description: Shows freshness of food and hides.

item.title: True Archimedes Screw
item.description: Adds an archimedes screw to move water with mechanical power and optional primitive water physics.

item.title: Aqueducts and Sluices
item.description: Previously called Hardcore Water. Adds aqueducts and sluices for water transport and control.

item.title: Fields of Cranberries
item.description: A simple mod allowing ripe cranberry bushes to drop their berries on coming into contact with water.

item.title: Fast Travel NPC
item.description: Allows players to fast travel in the world by paying rusty gears.

item.title: Resonator Overhaul
item.description: Per-resonator volume, falloff and looping — saved to the world and audible with Music off.

item.title: Resonator Tweaks
item.description: Simple mod to play the resonator as a sound effect. Will play with music off .

item.title: Terraria Biome Spread
item.description: Add some difficulty to your world with spreading evils with dangerous enemies and unique mechanics

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Temporal Convergence
item.description: Expands the creatures emerging from temporal rifts with new eldritch entities, afflicted automatons,

item.title: Messenger Pigeons
item.description: Send mail across the world using distance based messenger pigeons with secure pigeon boxes.

item.title: Age of Seraphs Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for the Age of Seraphs server that were too small to make into their own mods

item.title: CB Patches
item.description: JSON content patches for my small personal server

item.title: Mycodiversity
item.description: Adds 37 more mushrooms to the game.

item.title: Temporal Relics
item.description: Adds randomized affixes to found equipment, introducing mundane, corrupted, and temporally enhanced

item.title: Burdened
item.description: A weightier carrying experience: customizable slots, immersive carrying, server-enforced, and more.

item.title: Compost This
item.description: Compost This to accelerate your rot production

item.title: WOO Fantasy Additions
item.description: A mod focused on bringing the lore of the Oldwood into Vintage Story.

item.title: VS Roofing Mod
item.description: Gridless roof building system with vanilla roofs + extras.

item.title: Grassroots
item.description: Cannabis cultivation and hemp farming. Grow, dry, and cure a variety of strains. Enjoy your crop.

item.title: Party Hats
item.description: Party Hats!! Adds RS style party hats and a party hat cracker with confetti and random chances!

item.title: Birthdays
item.description: Gives your Seraph a birthday! Receive a random gift to celebrate!

item.title: VSReborn Server Patch
item.description: mega patch

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Tyrant King — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals tyrannosaurids to Vintage Story. Unofficial compatibility port for 1.22.3

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Shovel Mouth — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of hadrosauroids dinosaurs to Vintage Story. Unofficial compatibility port for Vinta

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Sharp Tooth — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals carcharodontosaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Scythe Claws — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of therizinosaurids dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Sailed Spine — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals spinosaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Plated Back — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of stegosaurian dinosaurs to Vintage Story.
